word: G1276 - διαπεράω - diaperáō - dee-ap-er-ah'-o - Go over

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διαπεράω

- Transliteration: Diaperao

- Phonetic: dee-ap-er-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to pass over, cross over, i.e. a river, a lake

- Origin: from G1223 and a derivative of the base of G4008

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1223 and a derivative of the base of G4008; to cross entirely: - go over pass (over) sail over.
